title: After the Kikuka Sho: The Next Challenge Awaits

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff! HUFF, PUFF!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yay! I won! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All riiiiight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea Matikanetannhauser was so
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
People have been talking about her since the
Japanese Derby! She's really optimistic and you
can't help but like her.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
She's not overwhelmingly talented or anything,
but she's a good runner who works hard and never
gives up.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
She works hard and never gives up... You're right
about that.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Um, e-excuse me! Would you mind sharing those
thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: Especially in regards to Matikanetannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sure thing! Gotta spread the good word
about Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in the know has their eye on her. She's a
racer's racer. Or something like that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, it's about time I get back to campus for
some running! I need to catch up too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the runners' tunnel to pick up
Matikanetannhauser when I hear some faint
voices.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I just want to say thank you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I really, truly gave it my all today! I competed as
the best version of myself!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And I think—No, I know it's thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So... thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I feel the same.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm several times better than I was previously. But
that's only because I needed to be if I wished to
stay ahead of you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to running with you senior
year too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Me too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After exchanging compliments, the two of them
return to the waiting room in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: There it is. Classic year is over.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Can you believe I won?! Yay!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's enough celebrating for now. I actually
have a little suggestion...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking about what I wanna do after
the Classic Triple Crown tour is finished.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember what the director said to me at
summer camp?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Like how it's not my race record that's interesting,
and that being ordinary is part of my charm or
something!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I was so happy when she said that but, honestly,
there's something I just can't wrap my head
around.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
After all, the people who motivate others are
usually really cool and strong and... all
sparkly-like.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I want to live up to the expectations she has for
me, but the more I think about, the more
confused I get.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So, for now, I'm just gonna go where my heart
tells me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And right now, the spring Tenno Sho is what gets
my heart thumping most!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I know it won't be easy! It's a 3,200-meter
long-distance G1 race that decides the best
stayer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure coming up with a strategy will be tough,
and I probably don't have enough stamina yet.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But still, wouldn't it be awesome to win a big race
like that in the spring?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may not be aware of it herself, but she's just
as optimistic as always.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And I know there's no preliminary for it or
anything, but I'd like to run another long-distance
race before then.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Like the 3,400-meter Diamond Stakes or
something!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's not really any reason for me to say no. If
she wants to do it, I want to help.
choice_data_list:
Okay. Let's make your next race the Diamond
Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've got it next time. I've just gotta work hard!
Just gotta grind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our next race is a long-distance G3
race—the Diamond Stakes!
